event: fell from bicycle and landed on handlebar
grade III lesion of pancreatic neck
pancreatic contusion on trauma CT scan
reassessment CT scan revealed complete rupture of pancreatic neck
no signs of other abdominal injuries
MRCP confirmed rupture of main pancreatic duct
intravenous proton pump inhibitor (pantoprazole 40 mg b.i.d.)
ERCP with papillotomy of pancreatic duct performed
no attempt to insert bridge prosthesis
two external 18 Fr tubes placed along superior and inferior pancreatic border
follow-up once a week at outpatient clinic
MRCP showed severed pancreatic duct with 6 mm diameter
MR angiography showed both halves of pancreas with arterial perfusion
10x10 mm HOT AXIOS stent inserted between stomach and cyst
CT scan 2 weeks after stent removal
both halves of pancreas had blood supply
